next_steps: Send stool for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture testing
Electromyography (EMG) or nerve conduction studies (looking for incremental response to repetitive stimulation)
Consult neurology for evaluation of neuromuscular junction vs. anterior horn cell pathology
Expedite administration of Botulism Immune Globulin (BabyBIG)
Inquire about exposure to honey, corn syrup, or environmental dust in the home
Monitor for autonomic instability and respiratory failure
